name: mastergo
description: Connect to the MasterGo canvas to allow AI to design, modify, synchronize, and retrieve D2C code.
description_zh: 连接 MasterGo 画布，让 AI 进行设计、修改、同步和获取 D2C 代码。
description_en: Connect to the MasterGo canvas to allow AI to design, modify, synchronize, and retrieve D2C code.
examples_zh: 使用 MasterGo MCP，为我设计一个任务管理系统界面
用当前文件已订阅的团队组件库生成 CRM 客户管理页面
把当前选中按钮背景改成黑色，文字改成白色
为我生成一套按钮组件，要求有大中小尺寸和不同的状态
获取我当前选中图层的前端代码
examples_en: Use MasterGo MCP to design a task management system interface
Generate a CRM customer management page using the team component library subscribed to the current file
Change the background color of the current selected button to black and the text to white
Generate a set of button components, requiring large, medium, and small sizes and different states
Get the front-end code of the currently selected layer
